news.headline: Sagent opens new Dallas office for Dara platform development, adding to global expansion.
news.summary: Sagent, a prominent fintech software company enhancing mortgage servicing for top US banks, has inaugurated a new office in Dallas, Texas. This move adds to their global presence post opening an office in Chennai, IN in 2023. The Dallas location will focus on product development and distribution, especially for Sagent’s innovative Dara platform. Recognizing Dallas as a thriving mortgage servicing center, the new hub signifies strategic growth for the company.

news.headline: Protiviti's i on Hunger program donates 16 million meals since 2014; gave 1 million meals in 2024. #fightinghunger
news.summary: In Menlo Park, California, on December 9, 2024, it was reported that Protiviti's i on Hunger program, operated by a global consulting firm, has provided over 16 million meals to individuals facing food insecurity worldwide since 2014. In 2024 alone, close to 1 million meals were donated as part of this initiative to combat hunger, distributed through 85 different channels.

news.headline: New Solana Spanish Villas in Tucson offers winter rentals for up to 40 guests on 5.7 acres. Ideal for retreats & reunions.
news.summary: Situated on a picturesque 5.7-acre plot in East Tucson, a unique property has been fully renovated to cater to short-term rentals and group accommodations for up to 40 individuals. Ideal for retreats, family reunions, and winter vacations, this tranquil setting in the Tanque Verde Valley offers a serene escape. This stunning property is now available for booking and is set to become a sought-after destination in the region.

news.headline: MIND Technology's 2024-12-10 earnings report may reveal an EPS of $0.13, with investors eager for positive guidance.(MIND Technology, $0.13 EPS, 2024-12-10)
news.summary: On Tuesday, December 10, 2024, MIND Technology (NASDAQ:MIND) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report. Analysts predict the company will post an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.13. Investors will be looking for MIND Technology not only to surpass this estimate but also to offer optimistic guidance for the upcoming quarter. This information is crucial for stakeholders as they await the financial performance update. The full story can be found on a financial news website.

news.headline: Mama's Creations (NASDAQ:MAMA) to announce $0.04 EPS on 2024-12-10, investors hoping for positive outlook.
news.summary: Mama`s Creations (NASDAQ:MAMA) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on Tuesday, December 10, 2024. Analysts predict that the company will report an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.04. Investors will be looking for Mama`s Creations to exceed this estimate and possibly provide a positive guidance for future growth. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ImmunoPrecise Antibodies on NASDAQ to reveal Q4 earnings on 2024-12-10. Expected EPS: $-0.07. Eyes on surpassing estimates.
news.summary: ImmunoPrecise Antibodies (NASDAQ: IPA) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings on Tuesday, December 10, 2024. Analysts are predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.07 for the company. Investors are eager for the announcement, anticipating that ImmunoPrecise Antibodies may exceed expectations and provide optimistic guidance for the upcoming quarter. Keep an eye on this stock as more information unfolds.

news.headline: Sportsman's Warehouse (NASDAQ: SPWH) to report EPS of $-0.02 on Dec 10. Past EPS missed by $0.05. Shares down 47.62% in 52 weeks. Analyst consensus rating: Buy.
news.summary: Sportsman's Warehouse (NASDAQ: SPWH) is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on December 10, 2024. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $-0.02 for the company. Investors are eagerly awaiting the announcement, hoping for results surpassing estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter. Previous earnings history shows a miss by $0.05 in the last quarter, resulting in a 6.7% share price increase the following day. The stock is currently trading at $2.12, down 47.62% over the past 52 weeks. Analysts have given a consensus Buy rating for Sportsman's Warehouse. Market sentiments and expectations play a crucial role in understanding the company's future performance. Full story available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Bynder served a record 6 billion assets during the peak shopping season, powering global content experiences online.
news.summary: In Amsterdam, Bynder, a prominent AI-powered enterprise DAM provider, has played a critical role in aiding multiple global brands in achieving record-breaking success during the Black Friday and Cyber Monday period. From November 27 to December 2, 2024, encompassing Black Friday, Small Business Saturday, and Cyber Monday, Bynder's Content Experiences (CX) for Omnichannel solution facilitated the delivery of exceptional content experiences on a large scale across numerous e-commerce platforms worldwide. This resulted in Bynder serving over 6 billion engagements in just seven days.

news.headline: Nicole Arangio appointed as EVP and Chief Compliance Officer at Liberty Mutual Insurance, replacing Karen Morton who retires in March 2025.
news.summary: Karen Morton, the current Executive Vice President and Chief Compliance Officer, has revealed her decision to retire in March 2025. The announcement was made in Boston on December 9, 2024. Tim Sweeney, the President and Chief Executive Officer of Liberty Mutual Insurance, introduced Nicole Arangio as the incoming Executive Vice President. This transition marks a significant change in leadership within the company. The retirement of Morton, a key figure in compliance management, reflects the reshaping of executive roles. Nicole Arangio is set to assume her new position, bringing fresh perspectives to the company's operations. This retirement announcement comes as a part of Liberty Mutual Insurance's strategic planning for the future.

news.headline: Insurance company and NBA G League announce Season 3 of "The Break", featuring star players like Dink Pate, Armando Bacot, and Mac McClung.
news.summary: A highly anticipated new season of a well-known documentary series delves into the lives of standout athletes such as Dink Pate, Armando Bacot, and Mac McClung. The General Insurance and NBA G League have revealed that "The Break, presented by The...," is set to make a comeback. This announcement was made on December 9, 2024, with New York and Nashville serving as key locations for the series. Viewers can expect an exclusive look behind-the-scenes with these talented players as they navigate their careers in the sports industry. Stay tuned for more insights and exciting revelations in the upcoming episodes.

news.headline: asTech® partners with Auto-Wares to offer advanced diagnostic tools to customers, improving shop performance.
news.summary: A collaboration has been established to provide Auto-Wares customers with cutting-edge diagnostic tools and solutions that comply with OEM standards, aiming to enhance repair processes and improve shop efficiency. The partnership, based in PLANO, Texas, was announced on December 9, 2024. Repairify, a renowned company specializing in remote diagnostics, calibrations, programming, and automotive services, is at the forefront of this initiative to support the automotive repair industry.

news.headline: ServiceTitan Elite Trades Championship to be broadcast on CBS Sports Network in December showcasing top tradespeople competing for $250,000+ in awards.
news.summary: A recent broadcast on CBS Sports Network focused on showcasing skilled trades as top electricians, plumbers, HVAC technicians, and auto mechanics competed for prizes exceeding $250,000. The event, known as the ServiceTitan Elite Trades Championship Series (SETCS), took place in West Palm Beach, Florida on December 9, 2024.

news.headline: US nonstandard auto insurers saw slight profit in first half of 2024 after 2 years of losses. Initiatives for safer driving are proving successful.
news.summary: In a recent report by AM Best, it was revealed that the U.S. nonstandard auto insurance segment has finally reached a slight profit in the first half of 2024 after two years of losses. This improvement in profitability can be attributed to initiatives taken by insurers to encourage safer driving habits and address the increase in loss costs. These efforts have not only boosted underwriting performance for personal auto writers overall but have also had a positive impact on nonstandard auto insurers. The change marks a significant shift in the segment's financial performance, indicating a positive trend in the industry.

news.headline: AMD reveals Nitro Diffusion models for improved AI image creation, utilizing AMD Instinct MI250 accelerators for training and edge deployment.
news.summary: AMD has recently launched the Nitro Diffusion models, which highlight cutting-edge AI image generation capabilities while maintaining a high level of efficiency. These models utilize AMD Instinct MI250 accelerators for both training and edge deployment. The introduction of these models marks a significant advancement in AI technology, demonstrating the capabilities and versatility of AMD's offerings. The Nitro Diffusion models are poised to revolutionize the way AI image generation is approached, showcasing the potential of utilizing advanced accelerators for improved performance. This development underscores AMD's commitment to pushing the boundaries of innovation in the AI sector.

news.headline: Reddit is planning to introduce an AI chatbot to deter scammers, conducting a test with 420 users before a full rollout.
Companies raise billions through convertible debt amid Bitcoin bull run.
Dow Jones dips, Warren Buffett stock up 44%. Intel CEO exit affects gains. Tesla, Intel see contrasting outcomes.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones experienced a decline despite a Warren Buffett-supported stock making strides by entering the market. Tesla's performance saw an increase, although Intel's gains began to diminish. Intel faced setbacks following the exit of its CEO. The mentioned Warren Buffett-backed stock recorded a significant 44% surge upon entering the market. This information was part of live coverage on the stock market.

news.headline: Gildan starts trading on NYSE, supported by NYSE Group.
news.summary: NYSE Group provided an image which was used in connection with a news report. It is important to note that NYSE does not promote or support any specific investments, investment strategies, companies, products, or services displayed.

Portugal undecided on stake size for TAP Airline sale.

news.summary: The TOMA token from Tomarket is set to be launched on the TON platform. Stay updated on the upcoming airdrop schedule and the future plans for the popular Telegram game.

news.headline: Cocoa price soars to 7-month peak due to declining crop outlook in West Africa.
Dow Jones Futures: S&P 500 and Nasdaq reach new highs; AI stock Credo up 34% on earnings. Apple, Meta, Nvidia in focus.
news.summary: Stock futures for the Dow Jones showed positive signs as the S&P 500 and Nasdaq reached record highs on Monday. Tech giants like Apple, Meta (formerly Facebook), and Nvidia saw their stocks either trading within or close to buy zones. Additionally, AI stock Credo experienced a significant 34% surge in response to its earnings report. The positive performance suggests a strong market sentiment, especially within the technology sector.

news.headline: Sarku Japan celebrating National Chicken Teriyaki Day on Dec 11, 2024, giving away free chicken teriyaki for a year to 150 winners.
news.summary: Sarku Japan is thrilled to announce its celebration of National Chicken Teriyaki Day on December 11, 2024, with a special giveaway event.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) rose 7.87% in 24 hours to $0.000027, with a 28.0% gain in the past week.
news.summary: In the last day, the price of Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) has increased by 7.87% to reach $0.000027. This upward trend follows a week where it saw a significant 28.0% increase, climbing from $0.000020 to its current value. The price movement and volatility of Pepe in the past 24 hours can be seen in the graph on the left, showcasing its recent performance.

news.headline: Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq hit record highs with Dow topping 45,000; recent IPO stock broke out.
news.summary: In the afternoon on Wednesday, major stock indexes were approaching all-time highs, with the Dow Jones surpassing 45,000. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq were also marking record closes. A newly launched IPO stock showed strong performance. The Magnificent Seven, a prominent name in the market, reached new heights.

news.headline: Chinese leader pledges to increase demand; address economic challenges.
Agrochemicals market set to grow, predicted to reach $282.2 billion by 2028 from $235.2 billion in 2023, with 3.7% CAGR.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of December 2nd, 2024, the agrochemicals market is poised for steady growth with an anticipated value of USD 282.2 billion by 2028. This projection marks a notable increase from the USD 235.2 billion recorded in 2023, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 3.7% throughout the forecast period. The surge in market size is primarily attributed to factors such as the expanding global population, heightened food requirements, and the intensification of agriculture. Agrochemicals, comprising fertilizers, pesticides, adjuvants, and plant regulators, serve a critical function in protecting crops, boosting yields, and upholding food standards.

news.headline: Analyst predicts Bitcoin could reach $200,000 by 2025 after hitting $100,000 this week, double the current value.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin surged past $100,000 this week for the first time, marking a significant milestone in the market. Analysts are now predicting that the cryptocurrency could double in value within the next year. This bullish outlook is driven by various factors such as increasing institutional adoption, growing interest from retail investors, and the limited supply of Bitcoin. If these trends continue, Bitcoin could potentially hit $200,000 in the coming months.

news.headline: Voxtur amends financial statements & MD&A for Q3 2024 due to disclosures, filed on Nov 28, 2024, for Sept 30, 2024.
news.summary: Voxtur Analytics Corp, a technology company based in Toronto and Tampa, announced that certain disclosures were discovered after filing on November 28, 2024, necessitating amendments to its Unaudited Condensed Interim Consolidated Financial Statements and related Management's Discussion and Analysis for the three and nine months ending September 30, 2024. The company, traded on TSXV as VXTR and OTCQB as VXTRF, focuses on creating a more transparent and accessible real estate lending ecosystem in North America. Following this discovery, amended Financial Statements and related MD&A have been filed on SEDAR.

news.headline: Circle Pharma presents preclinical data on CID-078, a first-in-class oral macrocycle cyclin A/B RxL inhibitor, at San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium 2024. December 10-13 event features global leaders in breast cancer research.
news.summary: In South San Francisco, California, Circle Pharma has unveiled a poster featuring preclinical data on CID-078 at the San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium 2024. The clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focuses on pioneering macrocycle therapies. CID-078 is a novel oral macrocycle cyclin A/B RxL inhibitor, marking a significant milestone as a first-in-class drug. The symposium, occurring from December 10-13, serves as a prestigious platform for breast cancer experts worldwide to convene. This presentation highlights Circle Pharma's innovative approach to breast cancer treatment and research advancements.

news.headline: Eli Lilly announces $3 billion expansion at US facility, adding 750 jobs. Total investments reach $23 billion.
news.summary: Eli Lilly And Co (NYSE:LLY) recently revealed plans for a significant $3 billion expansion of its manufacturing facility in Kenosha County, Wisconsin. This expansion is aimed at meeting the increasing demand for diabetes, obesity, and pipeline medicines. The investment represents the largest U.S. manufacturing commitment for the company outside Indiana and is set to generate 750 new advanced manufacturing roles, strengthening Wisconsin's position in the pharmaceutical sector. Construction for the expanded facility is scheduled to commence in 2025. This initiative is part of Lilly's broader global manufacturing expansion strategy. Additional details are provided in the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Nokia and Du launch first 5G Cloud RAN in UAE, targeting advanced applications. Deployment in Abu Dhabi features Nokia's virtualized Distributed Units.
news.summary: Nokia Corporation (NYSE:NOK) and Du have collaborated to introduce the first commercial 5G Cloud RAN solution in the Middle East and Africa. This strategic partnership highlights du's hybrid RAN approach, merging purpose-built and cloud-native infrastructures to boost flexibility and scalability. The implementation aims to drive digital expansion in the UAE by facilitating advanced applications like AI, machine learning, and industry-specific tools for sectors such as manufacturing, energy, and logistics. The 5G Cloud RAN site launched in Abu Dhabi, guided by Nokia's anyRAN approach, showcases Nokia's virtualized Distributed Units (vDU) and Centralized Units.

news.headline: Germany gift card market to reach US$16.1 billion in 2024, expected to grow at a CAGR of 8.3% during 2024-2028.
news.summary: A report titled "Germany Gift Card and Incentive Card Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics (Databook) - Q2 2024 Update" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. It forecasts the gift card industry in Germany to experience a 10.9% annual growth, reaching US$16.1 billion by 2024. The sector is anticipated to maintain growth with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.3% from 2024 to 2028. The gift card market in the country is expected to see increasing expansion.

news.headline: Forcura and Axxess partner to integrate palliative care software, allowing clients to streamline patient onboarding and care coordination with bi-directional API; enhancing connectivity for healthcare at home.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, Forcura, a company specializing in healthcare workflow management, has revealed a strengthened strategic partnership with Axxess, a prominent global healthcare technology platform for home care. This enhancement involves broadening connectivity to Axxess’ palliative care platform. As a result, client organizations utilizing Axxess for palliative care services are now able to efficiently handle the onboarding process and care coordination for patients. This is made possible through a two-way API integration with Forcura. By collaborating in this manner, Forcura and Axxess aim to streamline the workflow for these healthcare providers.

news.headline: Blue Shield's $500M savings initiative with Amazon Pharmacy could start in January. They ended partnership with CVS Caremark.
news.summary: Blue Shield of California has announced a new drug benefit initiative set to launch in January, partnering with Amazon Pharmacy and Abarca. Last year, the company ended its relationship with CVS Health Inc's Caremark and opted for new partners. Amazon will take care of home drug deliveries, Mark Cuban's Cost Plus Drug Company will provide access to cost-effective medications, and Abarca will manage drug claims processing. This move follows Blue Shield's decision to discontinue its association with CVS, marking a significant change in their operations. In August 2023, Blue Shield will fully roll out this initiative as it aims to enhance its services and provide better value to its members.

news.headline: Cloudflare published its 2024 Internet trends report, highlighting insights and security trends, showcasing popular services.
news.summary: In San Francisco today, Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE: NET), a prominent connectivity cloud company, released its fifth yearly Year in Review. The report delves into worldwide Internet trends and security patterns in 2024, with a special focus on popular Internet services. The Internet plays a crucial role in global connectivity by granting access to essential information and services that drive our routines. This reliance on the Internet has solidified its position as a fundamental element in modern society's framework.

news.headline: Analyst initiates Buy rating on CELH with $38 price target, citing potential for growth in energy drink market.
news.summary: Analyst Gerald Pascarelli from Needham recently gave Celsius Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:CELH) a Buy rating with a price target of $38. Positioned as the third-largest player in the energy drinks market, CELH is expected to capitalize on the growing demand for zero-sugar products and a rebound in the healthier drink category. The analyst notes that despite a recent year-over-year share loss, CELH is likely to benefit from a return to high single-digit growth rates in the category. This trend could lead to increased revenue acceleration, aided by easier year-over-year comparisons and upcoming innovations planned for 2025. Inventory optimization challenges are also being addressed, which is anticipated to enhance the alignment between sell-through and reported results. The analyst forecasts full-year 2024 revenue and EPS of $1.365 billion.

news.headline: Tech stocks hit record highs on AI optimism: Nasdaq up 0.9%, S&P 500 reached 6,077, Amazon stock soared 2%. Bitcoin nears $95,000.
news.summary: On Wednesday, Wall Street saw continued growth with technology stocks leading the way as optimism in AI-driven expansion grew stronger. The Nasdaq 100 surged by 0.9%, surpassing previous records, while the S&P 500 rose by 0.4% to hit a new high of 6,077. Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) notably increased by over 2%, breaking past its all-time highs from November. The surge was supported by early holiday sales success and positive outlook from the AWS annual conference, focusing on AI advancements. Economic data painted a mixed picture with the ISM services index showing slower growth than anticipated in November and ADP reporting 146,000 private payroll additions for the month, just below expectations.

news.headline: Pikkit's 2024 "Instant Replay" reveals 323M bets, $10.6B wagers with a 48% increase; NBA tops popularity among users.
news.summary: In New York, Pikkit, a sports bet tracking app, has released its 2024 "Instant Replay," providing insights into the sports betting trends and performances of the past year within the community. With a significant user base of over 600,000 monthly active users (MAUs), the platform monitored a remarkable 323 million bets in 2024, showcasing a substantial 48% surge from the prior year. These bets amounted to a total of $10.6 billion in tracked wagers, indicating a substantial 77% increase from the figures reported in 2023. Among Pikkit users, the NBA emerged as the most favored league in 2024, followed by other leagues.

news.headline: Stock of SoundHound, backed by Nvidia, surged 61% in a week after deal with Torchy's Tacos, but risks remain.
news.summary: Following a collaboration agreement with Torchy's Tacos to utilize its voice AI technology, SoundHound saw an increase in their stock value on Thursday and Friday. The Nvidia-backed company experienced a remarkable 61% weekly gain in their stock, leading to a surge in investor interest. However, while this sharp rally offers significant gains, it also comes with inherent risks that investors must consider.

news.headline: Fed Chair Powell says US economy strong, allowing for cautious interest rate policies. Economy growing at 2.5%, inflation at 2.3%.
news.summary: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell expressed optimism about the U.S. economy at the New York Times DealBook Summit. Powell highlighted the strength of the economy, stating that it is in very good shape, growing at approximately 2.5%. He emphasized that the U.S. economy is performing remarkably well compared to other major economies globally. Powell also mentioned that inflation has decreased from over 7% to around 2.3%. Unemployment figures were not specified in the provided information. The positive state of the economy has enabled the Fed to proceed cautiously with interest rates. Powell asserted that he aims to sustain this economic strength throughout his term. Powell's remarks indicate a favorable outlook on the economy and monetary policy moving forward.

news.headline: UnitedHealth and managed care industry suffer after executive's murder; worst week since Covid shutdown.Characters: 89
news.summary: The managed care industry, along with UnitedHealth Group, experienced significant repercussions following the tragic shooting of a high-ranking executive in midtown Manhattan. This incident resulted in UnitedHealth Group facing its worst week since the Covid shutdown, causing a considerable impact on the health insurance sector. The details of this event were reported in Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: One10 invests in Chicago-based Gavel International to expand its incentives portfolio, strengthening market position.
news.summary: One10 LLC, a prominent company in performance improvement solutions, has disclosed its strategic investment in Gavel International, a leading firm in incentive and travel solutions based in Chicago. This alliance signifies a significant development for One10, as it expands its services in crucial areas and bolsters its presence in the market. The investment provides Gavel with the opportunity to synchronize with One10's brand and utilize its exclusive incentive and recognition technology, enhancing their collaboration.

news.headline: HPE reports Q4 results of 58 cents EPS, $8.46 billion sales, exceed estimates. Analyst raises target price to $25.
news.summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co (NYSE:HPE) saw a rise in shares following the release of its fourth-quarter results. The company reported an adjusted EPS of 58 cents, surpassing the analyst consensus of 56 cents. Sales also exceeded expectations, increasing by 15% Y/Y to $8.46 billion, compared to the estimated $8.26 billion. For the first quarter, earnings are expected to range between 47 and 52 cents per share, falling slightly below the 49 cent estimate. Stifel analyst Matthew Sheerin raised the price target for HPE stock to $25 from $22, maintaining a Buy rating. The analyst highlighted the undervaluation of Hewlett-Packard Enterprise shares, attributing it to the diverse portfolio of infrastructure hardware, software, and services offered by the company. Despite some fluctuations in demand, particularly in networking, HPE continues to show strength.

news.headline: Federal Reserve Chair Powell likens Bitcoin to gold, calling it virtual, digital, and speculative. Bitcoin's volatility hinders its adoption as a reliable payment method or store of value.
news.summary: In a recent address at the DealBook Summit, Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell compared Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) to gold rather than the U.S. dollar. Powell described Bitcoin as a speculative asset, similar to gold in virtual and digital form. He dismissed concerns that Bitcoin poses a threat to the Federal Reserve or the U.S. dollar's stability, noting that its use as a payment method or store of value is limited due to its notable price fluctuations. Powell emphasized that Bitcoin's high volatility prevents it from serving as a reliable payment option or store of value. Full details of Powell's statements can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Dutch Bros named among top growth stocks added to IBD lists. Check out new names in IBD 50, Big Cap 20, Sector Leaders, Stock Spotlight, IPO Leaders.
news.summary: A variety of top-performing growth stocks, such as Dutch Bros, have recently secured spots on influential stock lists including the IBD 50, IBD Big Cap 20, Sector Leaders, Stock Spotlight, and IPO Leaders. Dutch Bros, known for its rapid growth, joins other promising companies in these prestigious rankings. This selection process underscores the financial success and potential for future growth of these companies. For investors seeking promising stocks to buy and watch, these newly added names present a compelling opportunity to explore.

news.headline: Weave wins 2024 Top Workplaces Culture Excellence Awards in 5 categories, based on verified employee feedback.
news.summary: A company based in Lehi, Utah known as Weave, listed on NYSE under the symbol WEAV, has received recognition as a 2024 Top Workplaces Culture Excellence winner in five categories. Weave specializes in providing customer experience and payments software for small and medium-sized healthcare businesses. The awards, which are based on verified employee feedback, are part of Energage’s longstanding tradition of surveying and recognizing organizations across 60 regional markets. The Top Workplaces accolades are given to organizations that excel in creating positive work environments.

news.headline: Ninjacart Startup Program launched to empower foodtech and agtech startups in India to accelerate growth.
news.summary: A significant update comes out of Bangalore, India, as the country's top agri-tech startup, Ninjacart, unveils the commencement of its Ninjacart Startup Program.

news.headline: Fed Chair Powell praises strong US economy, says it's in good shape compared to other economies. Mentions Bitcoin at NYT event.
news.summary: During the New York Times DealBook Summit, Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell expressed optimism about the U.S. economy, stating that it is currently strong and considered a model for other major economies. Powell mentioned that the economy is in excellent condition and affirmed his commitment to maintaining its strength throughout his term. He also addressed Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) during the event. Powell's remarks reflect a positive outlook for the economy and monetary policy. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
